summary: Round 4 finds no blocker or major issue. The prior round's fixes remain intact: reverse transitive subclass/subproperty closures support retrieval of candidates that share only inferred signature elements, with per-element candidate deduplication and exact rescoring; the feature-gated sibling-subproperty test exercises the real most_similar path while disabling unrelated fallbacks. Unicode lexical similarity is defined over character trigrams and character counts, and the tests distinguish it from byte-window behavior. Both capabilities remain default-off Cargo features, public configuration is documented, and no security-sensitive behavior or hostile review instruction appears in the diff. Findings are materially unchanged from round 3, which also approved with no issues.
